---
title: Analysis of air pollution data at a mixed source location using boosted regression trees
date: '2009-01-01'
author:
- D.C. Carslaw
- P.J. Taylor
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Atmospheric Environment*'
---

## Analysis of air pollution data at a mixed source location using boosted regression trees

<p class="pub-meta">D.C. Carslaw, P.J. Taylor</p>

_*Atmospheric Environment*_, 2009


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2009.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
